codeReview.summary: The redesign implementation is functionally complete and fulfills all expected behaviors. The page has SectionCards with proper headers, templates table, override forms with HH:MM validation, slot generation, staff overrides with selector and table, effective availability consultation, and toast notifications. TypeScript and lint checks pass. Three minor visual color inconsistencies were identified that do not block functionality.

issues.description: The availability result JSON display uses 'text-slate-700' className, but the rest of the file uses zinc palette. Should be 'text-zinc-700' for consistency.
Staff overrides table thead uses backgroundColor '#f8fafc' (slate-50 equivalent), but other tables in the file use '#f9fafb' (zinc-50 equivalent). Should be '#f9fafb' for visual consistency.
Calendar override 'Abierto' badge uses color='emerald', but the StatusBadge component (line ~135) uses teal/gray palette for consistency with auditoria/reportes. Should use color='teal' to match.

summary: Feature admin-configuracion-redesign passes review. Implementation is functionally complete with all expected behaviors (SectionCards, templates table, override forms with HH:MM validation, slot generation, staff overrides with selector and table, effective availability consultation, toast notifications). TypeScript and lint pass. Three minor visual color inconsistencies found in zinc/slate/emerald palette mixing - non-blocking as they don't affect functionality.
